title: Citizenship and Naturalization | Homeland Security
content:
- Citizenship and Naturalization

## Citizenship and Naturalization

### Citizen Naturalized Under Joe Biden Brutally Murders DHS Employee Lauren Bullis
DHS announced that Olaolukitan Adon Abel, a 26-year-old born in the United Kingdom, naturalized by the Biden Administration in 2022, brutally murdered DHS employee and public servant Lauren Bullis on April 13.

### CIS Ombudsman 2025 Annual Report
The CIS Ombudsman’s Annual Report is furnished to the Senate and House Judiciary Committees in the middle of the year.

### DHS Cracks Down on Visa Abuse as Trump Administration Ends Border Crisis and Drives Historic Drop in Foreign-Born Population
Under President Donald J. Trump’s leadership, DHS has shattered decades of failed policy, securing the largest increase in immigration enforcement funding in U.S. history and driving the first decline in the foreign-born U.S. population in more than 50 years.

### Two Charged for Opening Gunfire at Children’s Baseball Field Were Let into the U.S. by Biden
DHS announced two individuals charged in the heinous crime of opening gunfire on a children’s baseball field were allowed into the U.S. by the Biden Administration.

### On Constitution Day, President Trump Urges Naturalized Citizens to Honor and Respect American Law and Traditions
On Constitution Day, President Trump issued a letter congratulating newly naturalized citizens taking the Oath of Allegiance and urging them to “safeguard, honor, and respect” the American Constitution.

### The CIS Ombudsman's Webinar Series: 2024 Annual Report
On July 30, 2024, the Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS) Office of the Citizenship and Immigration Services Ombudsman (CIS Ombudsman) hosted a webinar highlighting its 2024 Annual Report to Congress.

### The CIS Ombudsman’s Webinar Series: Joint Webinar with USCIS on its New Fee Rule
On February 27, 2024, the Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS) Office of the Citizenship and Immigration Services Ombudsman (CIS Ombudsman) hosted a joint webinar with U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) on USCIS’ final rule to update certain immigration and naturalization fees (fee rule).

### How to Avoid Getting Locked Out of Your USCIS Online Account Tip Sheet
Tip sheet on how to avoid getting locked out of your U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) online account

### Tips for Submitting a Case Assistance Request
Tips for how to best request case assistance from the CIS Ombudsman office.

### Listening Session: Options for Laid-Off Foreign Workers
On January 19, 2023, the CIS Ombudsman hosted a listening session to hear concerns from stakeholders and present options for laid-off foreign workers.
